name: viberglass-monorepo
description: Viberglass monorepo - AI Agent Orchestrator and Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run dev -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run dev -w @viberglass/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @viberglass/types && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.platform:dev: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run dev -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run dev -w @viberglass/frontend"
scripts.platform:build: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run build -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run build -w @viberglass/frontend"
scripts.platform:start: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run start -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run start -w @viberglass/frontend"
